name: mlx-code-completion
description: Low-latency AI code completion powered by local MLX models on Apple Silicon

mlxCompletion.modelPath.description: Path to the MLX model directory (e.g., ~/mlx-models/Qwen2.5-Coder-3B-Instruct-MLX-4bit)

mlxCompletion.quantization.description: Quantization level for the MLX model

mlxCompletion.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before requesting a completion (20-200). Lower = snappier, more model load.

mlxCompletion.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens per normal completion (intent mode uses more). Lower = faster.

mlxCompletion.contextLinesBefore.description: Lines before cursor to include. Lower = faster prefill.

mlxCompletion.contextLinesAfter.description: Lines after cursor to include. Lower = faster prefill.
